IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO OPERATE EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE PURPOSES ENUMERATED IN THE IOWA GAMING COMMISSION ACT TO PARTICIATE IN ANY CHARITABLE, SCIENTIFIC OR EDUCATIONAL ACTIVITY WHICH THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS DETERMINES WILL POSITIVELY GROW GREENE COUNTY FOR FAMILIES AND HELP BUSINESSES THRIVE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO OPERATE EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE PURPOSES ENUMERATED IN THE IOWA GAMING COMMISSION ACT TO PARTICIATE IN ANY CHARITABLE, SCIENTIFIC OR EDUCATIONAL ACTIVITY WHICH THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS DETERMINES WILL POSITIVELY GROW GREENE COUNTY FOR FAMILIES AND HELP BUSINESSES THRIVE.
IRS990.Desc: TO OPERATE EXCLUSIVELY FOR THE PURPOSES ENUMERATED IN THE IOWA GAMING COMMISSION ACT TO PARTICIATE IN ANY CHARITABLE, SCIENTIFIC OR EDUCATIONAL ACTIVITY WHICH THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS DETERMINES WILL POSITIVELY GROW GREENE COUNTY FOR FAMILIES AND HELP BUSINESSES THRIVE.

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: ENHANCE QUALITY OF LIFE IN GREENE

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PRESENTED TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS FOR APPROVAL AT A BOARD MEETING

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 12c
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EACH OFFICER, DIRECTOR AND MEMBER OF A COMMITTEE WITH GOVERNING BOARD ANNUALLY SIGN A STATEMENT WHICH AFFIRMS SUCH PERSON HAS RECEIVED A COPY OF THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, HAS READ AND UNDERSTANDS THE POLICY, HAS AGREEED TO COMPLY WITH THE POLICY, AND UNDERSTANDS THE ORGANIZATION'S MISSION IS TO SERVE THE SURRONDING COMMUNITY AND IN ORDER TO MAINTAIN ITS FEDERAL TAX EXEMPTION IT MUST ENGAGE PRIMARILY IN ACTIVITIES WHICH ACCOMPLISH ONE OR MORE OF ITS TAX-EXEMPT PURPOSES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DOCUMENT AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST
